item.name: Vivid Pink Shrimp
item.description:
A shrimp known for its vibrant and resilient pink shell, as well as its long, sharp pincers.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Aether-rich spectral currents are believed to be the secret of this shrimp's brilliant pink shade, as well as its exceedingly resilient shell. Indeed, the crustacean's carapace is so strong that shipwrights often fashion its legs and pincers into nails for their vessels.
